creator: joemann@beefree.free.de
text:
Created attachment 206543
Update lang/smlnj to 110.91

Update lang/smlnj to 110.91

The attached patch to lang/smlnj should be identical to

	<ftp://offshore.free.de/pub/patch/smlnj.patch.20190814>
	MD5 (smlnj.patch.20190814) = 07b14b3ad827b7a7113a65396fa3d779

and does the following:

- Update to SML/NJ 110.91, upstream changelog: [1].
- Remove option POSITION64 (now the size of Position.int is
  always 64 bit).

Output from poudriere testport on amd64 and i386 is available: [2].

Thanks for considering this PR!
Johannes

[1] <https://smlnj.org/dist/working/110.91/HISTORY.html>
[2] <http://mesh-j-3.free.de/poudriere/smlnj/110.91/>
